WENDELL COCHRAN PROVIDES THE FOLLOWING WEB SITES OF COMPUTER COMPANIES ADDRESSING YEAR 2000 COMPUTER ISSUES:

Wendell Cochran June 1998
Technology

Wendell Cochran compiles a resource list of major computer companies and their websites addressing Year 2000 computer issues, including Microsoft, IBM, Apple, Dell, and others.

WENDELL COCHRAN PROVIDES THE FOLLOWING WEB SITES OF COMPUTER COMPANIES ADDRESSING YEAR 2000 COMPUTER ISSUES:

MICROSOFT: www.MICROSOFT.COM/CIO/ARTICLES/YEAR2000FAQ.HTM COREL: www.CoREL.COM/2000.HTM LOTUS: wWW.LOTUS.COM INTEL: HTTP://SUPPORT.INTEL.COM/YEAR2000/PAPER.HTM IBM: www.IBM.COM/IBM/YEAR2000 APPLE: www.APPLE.COM/MACOS/INFO/2000.HTML COMPAQ: www.COMPAQ.COM/YEAR2000 HEWLETT-PACKARD: www.HP.COM/YEAR2000/INDEX.HTML DELL: www.DELL.COM/YEAR2000 GATEWAY2000: wWW.GATEWAY.COM HOME/SUPPORT/c%5FTECHDOCS/Y2K/DEFAULT.HTM NOVELL: www.NOVELL.COM
